basic_details.job_title: CARI Guwahati Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Guwahati (CARI Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Guwahati (CARI Guwahati) Senior Research Fellow (Pharmacology) Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CARI Guwahati Senior Research Fellow (Pharmacology) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation in age for SC/ST/OBC candidates will be applicable as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. (Pharmacology), M.V.Sc. (Pharmacology), M. Pharm (Pharmacology), M.S.Pharm(Pharmacology), M. Pharm. (Ay.)/ M.Sc (Medicinal plants with specialization in Pharmacology with 02 years of research experience
qualification.details: M.D. (Pharmacology) or M.V.Sc. (Pharmacology) or M. Pharm (Pharmacology) or M.S.Pharm(Pharmacology) or M. Pharm. (Ay.)/ M.Sc (Medicinal plants with specialization in Pharmacology with 02 years of research experience
